highlights.text: On Wednesday, that was the failure 5620 and I wrote on Wednesday at 2:45PM: “Bear case tomorrow: Begans under 5620…There is also an advanced short available under 5673.” The Tariff shock took us under both those zones and we began a historic collapse that took ES down to 5428 by yesterdays close.

I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Bears control by default and next leg down begins under 5428.” and shortly after 4pm, we lost 5428, selling to 5377 overnight before a round of China retaliatory Tariffs took ES deeply lower down to 5090s by the close today.
As readers recall, on Wednesday morning a Failed Breakdown of the heavily tested 5620 level triggered long.

I wrote on Tuesday at 4pm: “We are in a rally leg that began on Monday with the failed breakdown of 5565…We could fill this out in many different pathways but as long as 5620 holds, we continue up to 5695, 5720-25.

In today's newsletter I'll talk this, I'll do a deep dive into Wednesdays and Thursdays historic price action as we saw excellent examples of two of my setups types: The Failed Breakdown, and the Breakdown Short.

post_title: Biggest Red Week For SPX Since March 2020. Can Bulls Relief Bounce Next Week? April 7 Plan
